reviews.comment:
Le falta para ser un ACA, esta en remsodelacion, la atencion buena, salvo el cocinero o el ayudante hablando en voz alta con la señora que atiende, usando malas palabras como si estuviera en la.cancha de Olimpo...

(Translated by Google)
It's not quite an ACA yet, it's under renovation. The service is good, except for the cook or the assistant talking loudly to the lady who serves, using bad language as if they were at the Olimpo stadium...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBeS02SmNREAE
